created_at.description: Date and time when the conversion was created.

deleted_at.description: Date and time when the conversion was deleted, if it has been moved to trash or removed.

description.description: Description or analyst notes for the conversion.

detail_url.description: URL linking to the conversion detail page.

input_text.description: Input CTI content submitted for conversion, typically MISP JSON or a STIX bundle.

is_active.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the conversion is active and not in trash.

name.description: Title or name of the conversion.

output_text.description: Output CTI content produced by the conversion, typically a STIX bundle or MISP JSON.

output_type.description: Expected output CTI format produced by the conversion.

public.description: Visibility flag indicating whether the conversion is public.

updated_at.description: Date and time when the conversion was last updated.

user_id.description: Identifier of the user or author who performed or owns the CTI Transmute conversion.

description: CTI Transmute conversion record describing MISP to STIX or STIX to MISP conversion metadata, inputs, outputs, status, and detail link.
name: cti-transmute-conversion
